assertions.title: Three highlight states render with correct visual treatment

steps.action: Upload preview-core.pdf and inspect highlight overlay
steps.expected: REDACT, KEEP, and UNCERTAIN highlights all visible simultaneously
steps.observed: 15 highlights rendered with decisions REDACT=13, KEEP=1, UNCERTAIN=1

steps.action: Query DOM/styles for one sample of each decision
steps.expected: REDACT red-tinted fill, KEEP green-tinted fill, UNCERTAIN amber dashed pulse
steps.observed: UNCERTAIN sample showed strokeDasharray '4px, 2px' and animationName 'hl-pulse'; REDACT/KEEP classes and color styles matched spec

steps.action: Capture baseline decisions for one REDACT, one KEEP, and one UNCERTAIN highlight

steps.expected: UNCERTAIN resolves to REDACT and pulsing stops
steps.observed: entity-32 changed to REDACT; animationName became 'none'

assertions.title: Tooltip appears on hover with entity type, matched text, and action

steps.expected: Tooltip shows entity type, matched text, and 'Keep instead' action
steps.observed: Tooltip text included US_SSN + matched value + button 'Keep instead'

steps.expected: Tooltip shows entity type, matched text, and 'Remove instead' action
steps.observed: Tooltip text included MONEY + matched value + button 'Remove instead'
Tooltip no longer present in DOM

assertions.title: Entity list sidebar shows groups with correct counts

steps.expected: Removing/Keeping/Your decision groups all visible with counts
steps.observed: All three group headings present with chips Removing=13, Keeping=1, Your decision=1

steps.action: Compare chip sum with total detected highlights
steps.expected: Count chip sum equals total entities

assertions.title: Click entity row scrolls document and focuses highlight

steps.expected: Corresponding highlight gets .hl-focused and row gets .active
steps.observed: One highlight had class 'hl-r hl-focused' and clicked row had class 'entity active'

steps.expected: Previous focus clears and new row/highlight becomes active
steps.observed: Focused entity changed between clicks while focusedCount remained 1

assertions.title: Page navigation via thumbnails and prev/next controls

steps.action: Upload preview-multipage.pdf and inspect page 1 controls
steps.expected: Page 1 indicator shown; prev disabled; next enabled
Navigate to page 2 then page 3; next disabled on last page
steps.observed: Indicators advanced to 'Page 2 of 3' then 'Page 3 of 3'; nextDisabled=true on page 3

steps.action: Click prev then click page-1 thumbnail
steps.expected: Return to page 2 then page 1; boundary disabled states restored
steps.observed: Indicator returned to page 2 then page 1; on page 1 prevDisabled=true and activeThumbIndex=1

frictions.description: The drop-zone UI exposes only a styled button; direct file attachment required temporarily exposing the hidden input[type=file] to use agent-browser upload.
frictions.resolution: Used in-session DOM style override via agent-browser eval to expose the existing file input, then uploaded fixtures normally.

frictions.description: One KEEP highlight did not toggle consistently with coordinate-based mouse click due hit-target precision in SVG overlay during automation.
frictions.resolution: Triggered click event directly on the targeted highlight DOM node to validate decision transition for that state.
